name: Warren Benson
abstract: Warren Frank Benson (January 26, 1924 – October 6, 2005) was an American composer. His compositions consist mostly of music for wind instruments and percussion.

works_created.t: Moon Rain and Memory Lane: Mourning for the Queen of Sunday
The Man with the Blue Guitar

about_quotes.speaker: Dan D'Imperio
about_quotes.evidence: I had studied with Warren Benson back when I was at St. Mary’s
